# APD440A2 Thorlabs detector spectral response
# Source: Thorlabs APD4x0A/APD4x0A2 typical responsivity plot.
# Curve used: APD410A2 & APD440A2 (M = 50), red trace.
# Original plot units: responsivity A/W, approximate peak 24 A/W near 590-610 nm.
# Values below are normalized relative response for use by filterDesignerApp.
